decision.title: Use JSON-driven updates for Obsidian project tracking
decision.context: Manual updates are error-prone and inconsistent for recurring project tracking events.
decision.decision: Adopt a script that applies structured JSON updates idempotently to Tasks, Weekly Status, Decisions, and Overview notes.
decision.consequence: Project tracking can be triggered from cron/CI and stays consistent over time.

overview_next_actions_add: Automate weekly status refresh with a scheduled run.
